sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Yellow square: rows 20-21, cols 24-25 (middle-center of gray box)
# Green square: rows 40-41, cols 12-13 (middle-right of gray box)
# Target: rows 40-41, cols 10-11 (middle-center of gray box)
# Need: LEFT

# Let me also verify the yellow square position
seg = current_frame.segmentation
for node in seg['nodes']:
    if node['color'] == 'Y':
        print(f"Yellow: boundary={node['boundary']}")
    if node['color'] == 'N':
        print(f"Green: boundary={node['boundary']}")

# Move green to middle-center
action(['LEFT'])
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
